title: 9 Herbal Tinctures for Multiple Sclerosis Patients with Gastroparesis
description: Angelica archangelica tinctures have been studied for their potential benefits in managing gastroparesis, a condition characterized by delayed stomach emptying. The tinctures contain compounds like ferulic acid, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These properties may help reduce inflammation in the stomach and improve digestion. The tinctures also contain volatile oils, including limonene, which may help relax...
